parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6761.14" y="-1400" width="990" height="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Workflow Start</b></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">--workflow-id hello-workflow-001</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">--input "world"</font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=7;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6737" y="-1340" width="300" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Task Scheduled</b></span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Workflow task added to</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">"hello-task-queue"</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=7;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6701.28" y="-1200" width="228.56" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Worker Picks Up</b></font></div><div><font style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));" face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">"SayHelloWorkflow"</span></font></div><div><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); font-size: 16px; font-family: Verdana;">task from queue</span></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=7;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6694.7300000000005" y="-1050" width="215.47" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Workflow Run</b></font></div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">"SayHelloWorkflow.run()" calls "execute_activity()"</span></font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=7;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6337.5" y="-1240" width="285" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Activity Scheduled</b></span></font></div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">"say_hello" activity added to queue</span></font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=7;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6367.5" y="-1075" width="205" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Worker Executes</b></font></div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">say_hello(World)</span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">returns "Hello, World!"</span></font></div>"
